case_title: JASON WONG VS. FARIAS OUTDOOR MEDIA, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JASON SERVED AUG-31-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FARIAS OUTDOOR MEDIA, INC.
DECLARATION ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT HAS BEEN LOST & COULD NOT BE FOUND. THE DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $166.66. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JASON
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT FARIAS OUTDOOR MEDIA, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FARIAS OUTDOOR MEDIA, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT FARIAS OUTDOOR MEDIA, INC. DOE 1 TO DOE 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT FARIAS OUTDOOR MEDIA, INC.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT FARIAS OUTDOOR MEDIA, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOE 1 TO DOE 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARIAS OUTDOOR MEDIA, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: BILLBOARD AT 1600 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
